releases.author: zafrem
releases.description:
RoleSwitch v0.1.0                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                        
  Initial Release                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                        
  RoleSwitch is an Obsidian plugin that helps you consciously switch between different work roles with intentional      
  transitions and session tracking.                                                                                     
                                                                                                                        
  Features                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                        
  Role Management                                                                                                       
  - Create custom work roles (Developer, Writer, Researcher, QA, etc.)                                                  
  - Define roles with unique colors, letter-based icons, and descriptions                                               
  - Full CRUD operations for role management                                                                            
                                                                                                                        
  Session Tracking                                                                                                      
  - Start and switch between role sessions with intentional transitions                                                 
  - Configurable transition duration (5-120 seconds)                                                                    
  - Minimum session duration lock (5-60 minutes) to encourage deep focus                                                
  - Real-time session duration tracking                                                                                 
                                                                                                                        
  User Interface                                                                                                        
  - Side panel view with role dashboard                                                                                 
  - Role analytics (daily, weekly, monthly statistics)                                                                  
  - Transition modal with countdown timer and context-switching tips                                                    
  - Status bar display (optional)                                                                                       
  - Workspace border visualization matching current role color (optional)                                               
                                                                                                                        
  Settings                                                                                                              
  - Transition duration presets: 5s, 10s, 30s                                                                           
  - Session lock presets: 5m, 15m, 30m                                                                                  
  - Border opacity control (0.1-1.0)                                                                                    
  - Periodic role reminders (1-60 minute intervals)                                                                     
                                                                                                                        
  Supported Platforms                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                        
  - Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android                                                                                 
                                                                                                                        
  Requirements                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                        
  - Obsidian v1.6.0 or higher

releases.author: zafrem
releases.description:
## ✨ Core Features

### 🎭 Work Role Definition
- **Custom Work Roles**: Create roles that match your different work identities (Developer, Writer, Researcher, QA, etc.)
- **Rich Icon Library**: Choose from 40+ professionally designed SVG icons across categories:
  - **Work & Productivity**: laptop, code, design, write, research, meeting, gear
  - **Learning & Growth**: learning, book, brain, experiment, lightbulb
  - **Communication**: email, phone, chat, meeting, users
  - **Health & Fitness**: heart, exercise, meditation, coffee
  - **Creative & Design**: music, art, camera, palette, star
  - **Navigation & Actions**: home, settings, search, plus, and more
- **Visual Identity**: Each role has distinct hex colors and scalable icons for instant recognition
- **Role Management**: Easy creation, editing, and deletion through intuitive settings interface
